languages.text: {n}Сервочереп лишь глухо жужжит сервомоторами — его взгляды на жизнь в Империуме остаются загадкой.{/n}
{n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Сервочереп лишь глухо жужжит сервомоторами — его взгляды на жизнь в Империуме остаются загадкой.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}
{n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on the stratification of society remain a mystery.{/n}
{n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on the stratification of society remain a mystery.{/n}
{n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Lo único que oyes es el zumbido tenue de los servomotores del cráneo flotante; su postura sobre la vida en el Imperium continúa siendo un misterio para ti.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Lo único que oyes es el zumbido tenue de los servomotores del cráneo flotante; su postura sobre la vida en el Imperium continúa siendo un misterio para ti.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你只能听见那头骨的伺服电机发出的低沉嗡鸣声，至于他对帝国生活的看法，依旧是个谜。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}你只能听见那头骨的伺服电机发出的低沉嗡鸣声，至于他对帝国生活的看法，依旧是个谜。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Seul le bourdonnement sourd des servomoteurs du crâne vous répond. Son avis sur la vie au sein de l'Imperium vous reste inconnu.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Seul le bourdonnement sourd des servomoteurs du crâne vous répond. Son avis sur la vie au sein de l'Imperium vous reste inconnu.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kafatasının hizmotorlarının düşük uğultusunu duyuyorsun. İmparatorluk'taki hayata dair görüşleri, gizemini korumaya devam ediyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kafatasının hizmotorlarının düşük uğultusunu duyuyorsun. İmparatorluk'taki hayata dair görüşleri, gizemini korumaya devam ediyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}聞こえてくるのはサーヴォスカルのサーボモーターの低い唸りだけ――帝国における暮らしについての彼の見解は、依然として謎のままだ。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}聞こえてくるのはサーヴォスカルのサーボモーターの低い唸りだけ――帝国における暮らしについての彼の見解は、依然として謎のままだ。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Du hörst nur das leise Summen der Servomotoren des Schädels ... seine Ansichten zum Leben innerhalb des Imperiums bleiben ein Geheimnis.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}You hear only the low hum of the skull's servo-motors — his views on life in the Imperium remain a mystery.{/n}
